description_long: This is a round white ceramic plate with a black rim, holding a hearty meal consisting of a large hamburger with a sesame seed bun, a fried egg on top, lettuce, and tomato. The plate also contains several thick-cut potato wedges, a serving of creamy coleslaw, and a couple of pieces of fried chicken or similar breaded meat. The hamburger is the most prominent item, with the top bun slightly askew to reveal the egg and fillings. The food is arranged to cover most of the plate's surface, with the coleslaw and potato wedges separated from the burger. The plate appears clean and well-presented, suitable for serving in a casual dining or urban outdoor setting.
description: A white ceramic plate with a black rim, topped with a hamburger, potato wedges, coleslaw, and fried chicken pieces. The meal is attractively arranged and visually appetizing.
description_view_0: The hamburger is prominent with the top bun and egg visible, and the coleslaw and potato wedges are clearly seen on the left side.
description_view_1: The back of the hamburger bun is most visible, with potato wedges and a bit of coleslaw peeking out from behind.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from the side, showing the open hamburger with egg, lettuce, and tomato, and the potato wedges in the foreground.
description_view_3: The hamburger is open-faced, with the egg and fillings clearly visible, and the coleslaw and potato wedges are well displayed around the plate.
materials: food (bread, meat, egg, vegetables, potato, coleslaw)
attribute_surrounding_context: The plate is shown isolated with no visible table or surface, but the food arrangement implies a dining or serving context.
